summary: Tested iteration-7 changes: open-to-all-USA-cities, auto-generated leagues (monthly/quarterly/half_yearly/yearly), standardized $9.99/$19.99 pricing, and 4 payment methods (Stripe + Apple Pay + Google Pay + Zelle with placeholder creds). Backend: 15/15 new pytest cases pass plus iteration-6 regression 11/11 still green. Frontend: leagues page free-text city filter + 'All Cities' filter works (24 auto leagues visible with correct $X.XX), Auth /register city has the new open-USA placeholder, Admin Auto-Generate tab generates idempotently and shows 'X already exist (skipped)', PaymentMethodModal opens on paid league Join with all 4 method buttons present (pay-method-stripe/apple_pay/google_pay/zelle).

issues: City input placeholder is still 'e.g. New York' instead of the spec'd 'Any city — e.g. Austin, Boise, or All Cities'. Datalist (cities-list) is wired and works, but placeholder text was not updated per the request.
filter-city placeholder reads 'Any city or \'All Cities\'' — works but slightly different from request copy. Acceptable.

React hydration warning in console: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' — caused by edit-mode wrapper injecting <span> into <option> elements in the season select. Cosmetic/dev-only but worth noting.

action_items: (Optional polish) Update Admin Create League city placeholder to 'Any city — e.g. Austin, Boise, or All Cities' per the original request.
(Optional polish) Investigate the <span> inside <option> hydration warning on Admin → Create League season select — likely the dev-tools instrumentation; only impacts dev console.

Main agent self-verification suggested: end-to-end click on pay-method-apple_pay in PaymentMethodModal → confirm UI shows [data-testid='payment-success'] panel after the wallet endpoint resolves. Backend endpoint itself is confirmed working via pytest; modal opens with all 4 methods; click-through success state was not fully observed in the smoke run (no payment-success or payment-error element appeared within 5 s, possibly because the modal needs an additional 'Confirm' click or a longer settle time).
critical_code_review_comments: auto_league_routes._add_months: minor edge-case — _add_months for end_date uses start_dt.day=1 then subtracts a day, which always yields the last day of the prior month — correct, no issue.

payment_routes.zelle_intent: assumes user['_id'] is a string (it is per User.to_mongo), but if user came from a Mongo lookup with ObjectId, memo slicing would fail. Currently safe because get_current_user returns the doc with stringified _id. Worth a unit comment.

payment_routes._confirm_player_registered: registers + creates standing + emails atomically without a Mongo transaction — race-safe enough for a placeholder flow, but two near-simultaneous wallet calls could both pass the 'already' check before either inserts. Consider an upsert or a unique index on (player_id, league_id).
auto_league_routes.normalize-pricing: duplicates seeds/pricing.py logic — fine to keep as an admin-callable, but the two should share one helper.
Frontend: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is referenced via process.env throughout — good. No hardcoded URLs spotted in changed files.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all spec'd testids present, all 4 payment methods render, Auto-Generate tab works, free-text city filter + 'All Cities' filter works

test_credentials: admin@leaguepro.com / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test users registered ad-hoc with TEST_/test_ prefixes.
seed_data_creation: Auto-generated 24 leagues via POST /api/admin/auto/leagues {cadence:'all'} as part of the test run. Idempotent — re-runs are safe. Seed pricing normalization migration ran on backend startup and is verified by the TestPricingNormalization test (no leagues with non-standard fees).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_pricing_payments.py cover /payments/methods, /admin/auto/leagues (idempotency + 24 total + admin gating + bad cadence), /payments/wallet (apple+google), /payments/zelle/{intent,confirm}, free-league join, and price normalization invariants. The auto-generated leagues persist in DB across runs — tests are written to be idempotent. Frontend smoke confirmed PaymentMethodModal renders all 4 methods on a $9.99 paid auto-league; the click-through to payment-success element was not observed in the time window — recommend the next agent (or main agent) explicitly verify by clicking pay-method-apple_pay and waiting >5 s for the success state. Auth /register city placeholder is the new open-USA copy ('Your city (e.g. Austin, Boise, Buffalo — anywhere in the USA)'). Admin Create-League city placeholder is still 'e.g. New York' — minor copy mismatch only.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found. Two cosmetic copy mismatches noted (Admin Create-League city placeholder, Leagues filter-city placeholder) and one React hydration warning (span inside option) on Admin → Create League — none of which break functionality.
